languages.text: "Себериан фон Валанциус занял положенное ему место в экспозиции, отображающей события на Даргонусе. То, что представлено здесь — коллекция предметов, связанных с индивидом".

traits.locale_text: "Себериан фон Валанциус занял положенное ему место в экспозиции, отображающей события на Даргонусе. То, что представлено здесь — коллекция предметов, связанных с индивидом".

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."
languages.original_text: "Себериан фон Валанциус занял положенное ему место в экспозиции, отображающей события на Даргонусе. То, что представлено здесь — коллекция предметов, связанных с индивидом".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."
"Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

"The flesh of Seberian von Valancius is the central exhibit of this display. A symbol of the temporality of any disruption to my plans and the inevitability of the restoration of order. There is no higher reward for a primitive than to be immortalised for the ages."
"Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."
"Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

languages.text: «Seberian von Valancius ha ocupado su lugar correspondiente en la exposición que muestra los sucesos de Dargonus. Aquí se muestra una colección de objetos relacionados con el sujeto».
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian von Valancius ha ocupado su lugar correspondiente en la exposición que muestra los sucesos de Dargonus. Aquí se muestra una colección de objetos relacionados con el sujeto».

languages.text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯已经在展示达戈努斯事件的展品中就位。这里陈列着与该个体相关的一系列物品。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯已经在展示达戈努斯事件的展品中就位。这里陈列着与该个体相关的一系列物品。”

languages.text: « Seberian von Valancius a pris la place qui lui revient dans l'exposition dépeignant les événements de Dargonus. Ici se trouve une collection d'objets liés de près ou de loin à cet individu. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian von Valancius a pris la place qui lui revient dans l'exposition dépeignant les événements de Dargonus. Ici se trouve une collection d'objets liés de près ou de loin à cet individu. »

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius, Dargonus'taki olayları gösteren sergide hak ettiği yerini aldı. Burada bu bireyle bir şekilde bağlantısı olan eşyalardan oluşan bir koleksiyon sergilenmekte."
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius, Dargonus'taki olayları gösteren sergide hak ettiği yerini aldı. Burada bu bireyle bir şekilde bağlantısı olan eşyalardan oluşan bir koleksiyon sergilenmekte."

languages.text: 「シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスは、ドラゴナスでの出来事を示す展示に、彼の本来の場所を占めています。ここに展示されているのは、彼と何らかの関係のあるアイテムの集まりです。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスは、ドラゴナスでの出来事を示す展示に、彼の本来の場所を占めています。ここに展示されているのは、彼と何らかの関係のあるアイテムの集まりです。」

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius hat seinen vorgesehenen Platz in dem Exponat eingenommen, das die Ereignisse auf Dargonus darstellt.. Hier sind einige Gegenstände mit einem Bezug zu besagtem Individuum ausgestellt."
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius has taken his proper place in the exhibit showing the events on Dargonus. Displayed here is a collection of items bearing some connection to the individual."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius hat seinen vorgesehenen Platz in dem Exponat eingenommen, das die Ereignisse auf Dargonus darstellt.. Hier sind einige Gegenstände mit einem Bezug zu besagtem Individuum ausgestellt."
